title: More Nonsense Limerick 53
content:
There was an old man of Ibreem,
    Who suddenly threaten'd to scream;
    But they said, "If you do, 
    We will thump you quite blue,
    You disgusting old man of Ibreem!"
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 53" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
